mapper.select: SELECT cr.*, c.category_name AS categoryName, i.file_path AS imagePath FROM cultural_relic cr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic_category c ON cr.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN relic_image_relation rir ON cr.id = rir.relic_id LEFT JOIN image_library i ON rir.image_id = i.id AND i.status = 1 WHERE cr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT cr.*, c.category_name AS categoryName, i.file_path AS imagePath FROM cultural_relic cr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic_category c ON cr.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN relic_image_relation rir ON cr.id = rir.relic_id LEFT JOIN image_library i ON rir.image_id = i.id AND i.status = 1 ORDER BY cr.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM cultural_relic WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT c.category_name AS categoryName, c.category_name AS category_name, COUNT(cr.id) AS count FROM cultural_relic cr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic_category c ON cr.category_id = c.id WHERE c.category_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT era, COUNT(id) AS count FROM cultural_relic WHERE era IS NOT NULL AND era != '' GROUP BY era ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT relic_code FROM cultural_relic WHERE relic_code REGEXP '^CR[0-9]+$' ORDER BY CAST(SUBSTRING(relic_code, 3) AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cultural_relic (relic_code, relic_name, category_id, era, material, origin, dimensions, weight, description, status, image_path, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{relicCode}, #{relicName}, #{categoryId}, #{era}, #{material}, #{origin}, #{dimensions}, #{weight}, #{description}, #{status}, #{imagePath}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT cr.*, c.category_name AS categoryName, i.file_path AS imagePath FROM cultural_relic cr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic_category c ON cr.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN relic_image_relation rir ON cr.id = rir.relic_id LEFT JOIN image_library i ON rir.image_id = i.id AND i.status = 1 WHERE cr.id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT rr.relic_id FROM repair_record rr WHERE rr.status IN ('待审批', '待修复', '修复中') ) ORDER BY cr.id ASC
